BUG-002.title: Docker socket paths fallback
BUG-002.fix: Added multiple candidate socket paths with os.path.exists() check
implementation: Added _candidate_socket_urls() helper that expands uid templates and filters by os.path.exists()
Replaced single fallback attempt with loop over candidate URLs in _create_client()
DOCKER_HOST env var already handled by docker.from_env() in Attempt 1

BUG-003.title: Docker Compose V1 fallback
BUG-003.problem: Hardcoded 'docker compose' (V2 only), no support for standalone 'docker-compose' (V1)
BUG-003.fix: Added detection with caching using shutil.which() and subprocess check
implementation: Added _compose_cmd cache variable (None = not yet detected)
Added _detect_compose_command() that tries 'docker compose version' first, falls back to shutil.which('docker-compose')
Added await_or_skip() helper for synchronous subprocess detection
Updated _run_compose() to use detected command prefix instead of hardcoded 'docker compose'
detection_priority: 3. defaults to V2 prefix if neither found
